titles.en: Reward of Calling out the Azaan
Reward of Calling out the Azaan

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بَشِیرٍ الْعَرْزَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَطْوَلُ النَّاسِ أَعْنَاقاً یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ الْمُؤَذِّنُونَ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ بَشِیرٍ الْعَرْزَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَطْوَلُ النَّاسِ أَعْنَاقاً یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ الْمُؤَذِّنُونَ.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan (rah) who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-Khattab from Ja’far b. Basheer al-’Arzami from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “The most elevated people on the Day of Judgment will be those who used to call out the Azaan.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan (rah) who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Muhammad b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-Khattab from Ja’far b. Basheer al-’Arzami from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “The most elevated people on the Day of Judgment will be those who used to call out the Azaan.”

narratorChain.raw: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ ره قَالَ

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ ره قَالَ
